plan_summary.primary_goal: Secure ICANN delegation of the .mars gTLD within 18 months under the 'Builder' strategy, with internal HSM cryptographic sovereignty and a defined Mars endpoint MOS.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests Year 1 financial viability of the .mars registry: whether the planned budget covers base overhead plus mandatory HSM CapEx and string-contention contingency, whether projected registration revenue covers Year 1 OpEx, and whether MOS compliance clears the 95% gate.

key_values.label: Total program budget (high-end)
key_values.comment: High-end envelope for the 18-month delegation effort. Lower bound is $25M; the model uses the upper anchor.
key_values.source_text: High-end budget envelope: USD 25M-100M or more

key_values.label: Internal HSM CapEx
key_values.comment: Mandatory CapEx to reverse external key custody; stated as $5M-$10M, midpoint used.
key_values.source_text: mandatory $5M-$10M CapEx immediately reallocated for internal HSM procurement

key_values.label: String contention contingency
key_values.comment: Reserve for string contention, legal defense, lobbying; stated $10M-$20M, midpoint used.
key_values.source_text: Contingency budget for string contention defense costs: $10M-$20M range

key_values.label: Year 1 break-even registration volume
key_values.comment: Required Year 1 domain count to cover base overhead; trigger for suspending the 50% revenue pledge.
key_values.source_text: Required Year 1 registration volume to cover base overhead: 5,000 registrations

key_values.label: MOS High Freshness compliance threshold
key_values.comment: Tripwire: if compliance for High Freshness validation drops below 95%, mission-critical registrations halt.
key_values.source_text: If the MOS compliance rate for High Freshness validation drops below 95%, then mission-critical registrations must be halted

key_values.label: Net revenue pledge fraction
key_values.comment: Share of net registry revenue committed to the environmental/scientific fund once base overhead is covered.
key_values.source_text: Net registry revenue commitment: 50% to Mars environmental protection fund

derived_questions.question: Does the program budget survive HSM CapEx and string-contention contingency draws?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: If the budget cannot absorb both mandatory CapEx and the risk reserve, the Builder strategy cannot fund its critical pivots.

derived_questions.question: Does observed MOS compliance clear the 95% mission-critical halt threshold?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Below this margin, high-freshness mission-critical registrations must be halted, undermining adoption.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Year 1 average price per .mars domain
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives Year 1 registry revenue and break-even feasibility against base overhead and pledge.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark recent ICANN gTLD launches with similar political profile; assume premium $50-$200/domain range.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Year 1 base operating expense
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to compute break-even revenue and the surplus left for the 50% pledge.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum 5 FTE loaded cost, cloud DNS hosting, compliance audits, outsourced ZSK signing; cross-check with stated $5M-$10M OpEx.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected Year 1 .mars registrations
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against break-even volume to test whether the pledge can be honoured without depleting reserves.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up from addressable space-industry buyers times adoption rate; sanity-check against early new-gTLD Year-1 volumes.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Observed MOS High-Freshness compliance rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against the 95% halt threshold to compute the MOS compliance margin.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Simulate 100kbps endpoints under 60-minute sync window using ns-3; report 90-day mean compliance rate.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Buffer fraction over break-even before triggering pledge
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Plan demands a 30% buffer above break-even before the 50% net revenue pledge activates.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use stated 30% target as base; bound 20-40% from financial-model sensitivity to price and volume.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year 1 registry revenue
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Top-line Year 1 revenue is the input to every viability and pledge-trigger test.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year 1 revenue surplus over base OpEx
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus is the precondition for honouring the 50% net revenue pledge without depleting capital reserves.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Registration volume margin over break-even
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether expected demand clears the 5,000-domain break-even threshold that controls pledge suspension.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Budget surplus after HSM CapEx and contention contingency
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Confirms the high-end budget envelope can absorb mandatory CapEx and the named risk reserve without going negative.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Surplus after pledge draw and 30% buffer
recommended_first_calculations.formula_hint: pledge_coverage_surplus_usd = year1_revenue_surplus_usd - revenue_pledge_fraction * year1_revenue_surplus_usd - registration_volume_buffer_fraction * year1_base_opex_usd
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Plan requires a 30% buffer over OpEx after honouring the 50% net revenue pledge; positive = pledge sustainable.

unmodelled_gates.label: ICANN gTLD delegation approval
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without ICANN approving the application, no .mars registry exists regardless of financial or technical readiness.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Plan terminates; no delegation, no registry revenue, sunk capital on application and lobbying.

unmodelled_gates.label: Major space agency non-objection
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Builder strategy depends on at least two major space agencies offering public non-objection support during ICANN review.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: ICANN review momentum stalls; political legitimacy collapses; application likely rejected or delayed beyond the 18-month window.

unmodelled_gates.label: Absence of blocking governmental objection
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Formal objections from governments to private operation of a planetary namespace could veto delegation regardless of technical readiness.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: 6-12 month delay and $5M-$10M extra cost; potential outright application failure on political grounds.

unmodelled_gates.label: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM certification
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Internal KSK custody must pass an independent FIPS 140-2 Level 3 audit by Q4 2026 to satisfy ICANN's cryptographic sovereignty expectations.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Loss of cryptographic sovereignty narrative; ICANN may reject delegation or force reversion to outsourced signing.
